name: Barbell Bench Press
description: Lie on a flat bench, grip the barbell slightly wider than shoulder-width. Lower the bar to mid-chest, then press back up.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
description: Set bench to 30-45 degrees. Press dumbbells from chest level to full extension, focusing on upper chest.

name: Dumbbell Flyes
description: Lie flat, arms extended holding dumbbells. Lower arms in an arc to the sides, then squeeze back to starting position.

name: Cable Crossover
description: Stand between cable machines, pull handles down and across your body, squeezing chest at the bottom.

name: Push-Ups
description: Hands shoulder-width apart, body straight. Lower chest to ground, then push back up maintaining core engagement.

name: Decline Barbell Press
description: On a decline bench, lower barbell to lower chest and press up, targeting lower pec muscles.

name: Chest Dips
description: Lean forward on parallel bars, lower body by bending elbows to 90 degrees, then push back up.

name: Incline Barbell Press
description: On incline bench, press barbell from upper chest to lockout, emphasizing upper pectorals.

name: Pec Deck Machine
description: Sit with back against pad, bring handles together in front of chest, squeezing pecs at peak contraction.

name: Landmine Press
description: Hold landmine barbell at chest, press up and forward at an angle, engaging chest and shoulders.

name: Deadlift
description: Hip-width stance, grip barbell. Drive through heels while keeping back straight, extending hips and knees.

name: Pull-Ups
description: Hang from bar with overhand grip. Pull body up until chin clears bar, lower with control.

name: Barbell Row
description: Bend at hips, row barbell to lower chest/upper abdomen, squeezing shoulder blades together.

name: Lat Pulldown
description: Sit at machine, pull bar down to upper chest, focusing on pulling with elbows rather than hands.

name: Seated Cable Row
description: Pull cable handle to torso, keeping back straight. Squeeze shoulder blades at peak contraction.

name: T-Bar Row
description: Straddle bar, row towards chest with neutral grip, keeping core tight and back straight.

name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Row
description: Support yourself on bench, row dumbbell to hip, focusing on lat engagement and controlled movement.

name: Face Pulls
description: Pull rope attachment towards face, separating hands at end. Targets rear delts and upper back.

name: Chin-Ups
description: Underhand grip, pull body up focusing on biceps and lats. Excellent for building back thickness.

name: Hyperextensions
description: On hyperextension bench, bend at hips and raise torso, strengthening lower back and glutes.

name: Barbell Squat
description: Bar on upper back, descend until thighs parallel to ground, drive through heels to stand.

name: Romanian Deadlift
description: Keep slight knee bend, hinge at hips lowering bar down legs, feel stretch in hamstrings.

name: Leg Press
description: Push platform away with feet shoulder-width apart, lowering until knees at 90 degrees.

name: Walking Lunges
description: Step forward into lunge, alternate legs. Keep front knee behind toes, torso upright.

name: Leg Curl
description: Lying or seated, curl weight towards glutes, squeezing hamstrings at top of movement.

name: Leg Extension
description: Seated, extend legs against pad, squeezing quadriceps at full extension.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
description: Rear foot elevated, lunge down on front leg. Excellent for unilateral leg development.

name: Calf Raises
description: Rise onto toes, squeezing calves at top. Can be done standing or seated for different calf heads.

name: Hack Squat
description: On hack squat machine, push through heels to extend legs, maintaining back contact with pad.

name: Goblet Squat
description: Hold dumbbell at chest, squat deep keeping elbows inside knees. Great for mobility and form.

name: Overhead Press
description: Press barbell from shoulders to overhead lockout, keeping core tight and avoiding excessive back arch.

name: Lateral Raises
description: Raise dumbbells to sides until parallel with ground, leading with elbows, targeting side delts.

name: Front Raises
description: Raise dumbbells or barbell to front until shoulder height, working anterior deltoids.

name: Arnold Press
description: Start with palms facing you, rotate to overhand as you press up, hitting all delt heads.

name: Rear Delt Flyes
description: Bent over, raise dumbbells to sides focusing on rear deltoids and upper back.

name: Upright Row
description: Pull barbell up along body to chin level, elbows leading. Targets shoulders and traps.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
description: Cross cables for constant tension, raise to shoulder height maintaining slight elbow bend.

name: Machine Shoulder Press
description: Seated at machine, press handles overhead in controlled motion, easier to isolate shoulders.

name: Shrugs
description: Hold dumbbells or barbell, elevate shoulders towards ears squeezing traps at top.

name: Pike Push-Ups
description: In downward dog position, bend elbows to lower head towards ground, pressing back up.

name: Barbell Curl
description: Stand with barbell, curl up to shoulders keeping elbows stationary, lower with control.

name: Tricep Dips
description: On parallel bars or bench, lower body by bending elbows, extend to starting position.

name: Hammer Curls
description: Neutral grip curls, targeting brachialis and brachioradialis for overall arm thickness.

name: Overhead Tricep Extension
description: Hold weight overhead, lower behind head by bending elbows, extend back up.

name: Preacher Curl
description: Arms on preacher pad, curl weight isolating biceps with no momentum.

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
description: Narrow grip on barbell, press focusing on triceps. Keep elbows close to body.

name: Cable Curl
description: Use cable machine for constant tension throughout curl movement, great for bicep peak.

name: Tricep Pushdown
description: Push rope or bar down, extending elbows fully and squeezing triceps at bottom.

name: Concentration Curl
description: Seated, elbow braced on thigh, curl dumbbell with maximum bicep contraction.

name: Diamond Push-Ups
description: Hands close together forming diamond shape, lower and press up targeting triceps.

name: Plank
description: Hold body straight in push-up position on forearms, engaging entire core.

name: Russian Twists
description: Seated, lean back slightly, rotate torso side to side touching weight to ground.

name: Hanging Leg Raises
description: Hang from bar, raise legs to parallel or higher, lowering with control.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
description: On knees or feet, roll wheel forward extending body, return using core strength.

name: Cable Crunches
description: Kneel at cable machine, crunch down bringing elbows to knees, squeezing abs.

name: Bicycle Crunches
description: Lying down, bring opposite elbow to knee in cycling motion, engaging obliques.

name: Dead Bug
description: On back, extend opposite arm and leg while keeping core engaged and lower back flat.

name: Mountain Climbers
description: Plank position, alternate driving knees to chest rapidly, working core and cardio.

name: Pallof Press
description: Stand sideways to cable, press handle forward resisting rotation, engaging anti-rotation muscles.

name: V-Ups
description: Lying flat, simultaneously raise arms and legs to meet in V-shape, lower with control.
